creator: magik@roorback.net
text:
I wanna install some modules from http://godashboard.appspot.com/package
But goinstall nor manual install of most packages don't work, because they need sources of bundled packages. I thing they should be installed with compiler (maybe using option for pkg sources)


Patch in attachment

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Simplest test:
> goinstall github.com/hoisie/web.go

This need git command
